title: Flee
actors: Daniel Karimyar, Fardin Mijdzadeh, Milad Eskandari
plot: A man look back over his life as he grapples with a painful secret he has keep hidden for 20 years, one that threatens to derail the life he has built for himself and his soon to be husband.
language: Spanish, Danish, English, Dari, Russian, Swedish
country: Denmark, France, Norway, Sweden, Netherlands, United Kingdom, United States, Finland, Italy, Spain, Estonia, Slovenia, Belgium
awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 99 wins & 152 nominations total
